transfer_policy.COPY_EXACT: new B1b-only code, fixtures and independent tests copied by exact Git blob
transfer_policy.THREE_WAY_PORT: shared schemas and tests receive minimal semantic patches against current main
transfer_policy.RECREATE_ON_TARGET: execution state, closure evidence and manifest overlay are created only after green gates
transfer_policy.FORBIDDEN: historical governance, live state, README, assurance plan and old overlays are never copied

protected_invariants: real commercial data admission remains mandatory
raw commercial data remains prohibited in GitHub, CI and external model prompts
